subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-07
subcodes.first_line: I will tell you heavenly glad-tidings -- the glad-tidings of God are of two kinds
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
